## How To Test

## Checklist

- [ ] The PR links to the issue or PRD story it implements.
- [ ] Reviewer-facing docs or workflow notes were updated when behavior changed.
- [ ] No generated build artifacts, payload files, or binaries are committed.
- [ ] No `app.asar` JavaScript patches are introduced.
- [ ] Platform-specific changes stay inside the relevant platform directory unless shared behavior changed.
- [ ] Upstream pin changes state the old SHA, new SHA, reason for bump, and smoke evidence.
- [ ] Packaging/runtime changes include the AppImage, installer, or boot-smoke evidence reviewers need.
